options.a: The fog can form by any usual process but it becomes freezing fog when the temperature is below 0 °C.
options.b: By advection between the 60°N and higher latitudes.
options.c: By advection when the wind speed is between 5-10 kt and the OAT is between 0°C and 5°C.
options.d: By radiation in the early mornings.
